# 🚀 Pull Request

## 📝 Description

### What was done?
- Briefly describe the changes made for the Chase Game.
- Did you fix the robot AI, adjust the diagonal movement, or improve obstacle physics?

### Why was it done?
- How does this improve the strategic gameplay or the structured code logic?

### 📸 Media (Optional)
*If you added new sprites, board animations, or visual effects, please attach a screenshot or GIF here.*

---

## 🏗️ Type of Change
Please check the option that is relevant:
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds gameplay functionality)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactor (improving structured logic without changing behavior)
- [ ] 🎨 UI/Graphics update
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code runs locally and the game starts without errors.
- [ ] I have verified that all 8 movement directions (including diagonals) work correctly.
- [ ] I have tested the robot collision logic (robot-to-robot and robot-to-obstacle).
- [ ] I have checked that the Teleport feature works as expected.
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` if I added new controls or game symbols.

---

Thanks for your contribution to **Chase Game**! 🏃‍♂️
